description_long: This bungalow features a compact, open-walled design with a partially covered porch and a small staircase leading up to the main entrance. The exterior walls are primarily white with bold horizontal red-orange stripes, accented by dark wooden beams and stone corner supports. The interior is visible, revealing a cozy, multi-level living space with wooden floors, shelves, and a variety of household items such as barrels, pots, and rugs. A green and red awning shades the entrance, and a small market stall or counter is set up just inside, suggesting a mixed-use residential and commercial function. The windows are minimal, with one small window on the side wall, and the roof is flat with a slight overhang. Decorative elements and vibrant colors give the bungalow a lively, inviting appearance suitable for a bustling urban neighborhood.
description: A compact, colorful bungalow with a flat roof, open porch, and vibrant striped walls, featuring a cozy, multi-level interior and a shaded entrance with market-style decor.
description_view_0: Front and side view showing the open porch, stairs, shaded entrance, and detailed interior with shelves, rugs, and various household items.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying a plain white wall with stone corner supports and minimal architectural features.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting a small window, some interior furnishings, and a glimpse of the market stall setup.
description_view_3: Angled front view emphasizing the stairs, porch, awning, and the vibrant, detailed arrangement of objects inside and outside the entrance.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with a single small side window
